title: Bridge Essay: Multidimensionality of hallucination-like experiences: A factor structure refine

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Daimon** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Daimonic voice — voice-hearing continuum, inner speech misattribution, corollary discharge.

**Multidimensionality of hallucination-like experiences: Afactor structure refinement of the Launay-Slade Hallucination Scale.**. Schizophr Res Cogn.. PMID: 40502544. DOI: 10.1016/j.scog.2025.100368. BACKGROUND: Previous research on the multidimensionality of hallucination-like experiences (HLEs) across the psychosis continuum highlights methodological disparities, emphasizing the need for acautious interpretation of findings and transparent reporting of parameters used in the analysis. METHODS: This study aimed to refine the factorial structure of the 16-item Launay-Slade Hallucination Scale (LSHS), enhance methodological clarity, and improve the robustness of LSHS factor solutions.
